|desc={{p|Toxicroak}} is Saturn's first known Pokémon. She has been under his ownership since she was a {{p|Croagunk}}. Usually, she is seen imitating Saturn's movements. She was first seen in battle against Paka and Uji but despite putting up a good fight, she was eventually defeated. In the {{MangaArc|Platinum}}, she was revealed to have evolved into a Toxicroak.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Abra
|type1=Psychic
|img=Saturn Abra Adventures.png
|epnum=PS352
|epname=Crowded by Croagunk & Advanced on by Abra I
|desc={{p|Abra}} is Saturn's second known Pokémon. Abra was first used against Paka and Uji where it used its powerful teleportation and attacks to make it hard to hit but was eventually defeated. Abra was later used against Fantina and Roark but was defeated along with its Trainer.

Abra's known moves are {{m|Teleport}}, {{m|Fire Punch}}, and {{m|Ice Punch}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Octillery
|type1=Water
|img=Saturn Octillery Adventures.png
|epnum=PS397
|epname=Outwitting Octillery
|desc={{p|Octillery}} is Saturn's third known Pokémon. Octillery was first used at Lake Verity where it dragged [[Rad Rickshaw]] into the lake and later attacked Pearl with its powerful moves. Octillery was later used against Fantina and Roark but was defeated along with its Trainer.

Octillery's known moves are {{m|Octazooka}}, {{m|Gunk Shot}}, and {{m|Blizzard}}.}}
